lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Salok, Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮੁ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰਮ ਧੁਰਹੁ ਫੁਰਮਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dharam karaae karam dhurahu furamaaeaa |3|
lines.english: The Primal Lord has ordained that mortals must practice righteousness. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਵਣੁ ਆਇਆ ਹੇ ਸਖੀ ਕੰਤੈ ਚਿਤਿ ਕਰੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: saavan aaeaa he sakhee kantai chit karehu |
lines.english: The month of Saawan has come, O my companions; think of your Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਵਣੁ ਆਇਆ ਹੇ ਸਖੀ ਜਲਹਰੁ ਬਰਸਨਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: saavan aaeaa he sakhee jalahar barasanahaar |
lines.english: The month of Saawan has come, O my companions; the clouds have burst forth with rain.

lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਝੂਰਿ ਮਰਹਿ ਦੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਿਨੑ ਅਵਰੀ ਲਾਗਾ ਨੇਹੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jhoor mareh dohaaganee jina avaree laagaa nehu |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the discarded bride is in love with another; now she weeps and wails, and dies. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਛਿੰਝ ਪਵਾਇ ਮਲਾਖਾੜਾ ਰਚਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape chhinjh pavaae malaakhaarraa rachiaa |
lines.english: He Himself has staged the tournament, and arranged the arena for the wrestlers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖਿ ਸਵਨੁ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਿਨੑ ਸਹ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sukh savan sohaaganee jina seh naal piaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the blessed soul-brides sleep in peace; they are in love with their Husband Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਭਿੜੈ ਮਾਰੇ ਆਪਿ ਆਪਿ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਰਚਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aap bhirrai maare aap aap kaaraj rachiaa |
lines.english: The Lord Himself wrestles, and He Himself defeats them. He Himself staged this play.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਥੇ ਭੜਥੂ ਪਾਇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਚਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: lathe bharrathoo paae guramukh machiaa |
lines.english: They have entered the arena with pomp and ceremony; the Gurmukhs are joyful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮਾਰੇ ਪਛਾੜਿ ਮੂਰਖ ਕਚਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh maare pachhaarr moorakh kachiaa |
lines.english: The false and foolish self-willed manmukhs are defeated and overcome.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਲਿਖੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਲੇਖੁ ਵਿਣੁ ਕਲਮ ਮਸਵਾਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: hukamee likhai sir lekh vin kalam masavaaneeai |
lines.english: He writes the inscription of His Hukam on the foreheads of all, without pen or ink.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਖਸਮੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa khasam ek hai guramukh jaaneeai |
lines.english: The One God is the Lord and Master of all; this is known by the Gurmukhs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਲਾਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak sachaa sabad salaeh sach pachhaaneeai |4|
lines.english: O Nanak, praising the True Word of His Shabad, one comes to realize the Truth. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਾਪੁ ਜਿਥੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਸਦਾ ਵਖਾਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat melaap jithai har gun sadaa vakhaaneeai |
lines.english: In the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, Union with Him is obtained; there, the Glorious Praises of the Lord are chanted forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਜਾਣਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਾਹ ਸਿਉ ਕੇਵ ਰਹਸੀ ਰੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa jaanaa tis saah siau kev rahasee rang |
lines.english: How do I know whether my love for my Husband Lord shall endure?

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਂਨਵਿ ਊਂਨਵਿ ਆਇਆ ਅਵਰਿ ਕਰੇਂਦਾ ਵੰਨ ॥
lines.translit: aoonav aoonav aaeaa avar karendaa van |
lines.english: Hanging low, low and thick in the sky, the clouds are changing color.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗੁ ਰਹਿਆ ਤਿਨੑ ਕਾਮਣੀ ਜਿਨੑ ਮਨਿ ਭਉ ਭਾਉ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: rang rahiaa tina kaamanee jina man bhau bhaau hoe |
lines.english: The love of those soul-brides endures, if their minds are filled with the Love and the Fear of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭੈ ਭਾਇ ਬਾਹਰੀ ਤਿਨ ਤਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak bhai bhaae baaharee tin tan sukh na hoe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, she who has no Love and Fear of God - her body shall never find peace. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਂਨਵਿ ਊਂਨਵਿ ਆਇਆ ਵਰਸੈ ਨੀਰੁ ਨਿਪੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: aoonav aoonav aaeaa varasai neer nipang |
lines.english: Hanging low, low and thick in the sky, the clouds come, and pure water rains down.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗਾ ਤਿਨੑ ਕਾਮਣੀ ਜਿਨੑ ਕੰਤੈ ਸਿਉ ਮਨਿ ਭੰਗੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak dukh laagaa tina kaamanee jina kantai siau man bhang |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, that soul-bride suffers in pain, whose mind is torn away from her Husband Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਵੈ ਤਰਫਾ ਉਪਾਇ ਇਕੁ ਵਰਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dovai tarafaa upaae ik varatiaa |
lines.english: The One Lord created both sides and pervades the expanse.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਬਾਣੀ ਵਰਤਾਇ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਵਾਦੁ ਘਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: bed baanee varataae andar vaad ghatiaa |
lines.english: The words of the Vedas became pervasive, with arguments and divisions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਵਿਰਤਿ ਨਿਰਵਿਰਤਿ ਹਾਠਾ ਦੋਵੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਧਰਮੁ ਫਿਰੈ ਰੈਬਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: paravirat niravirat haatthaa dovai vich dharam firai raibaariaa |
lines.english: Attachment and detachment are the two sides of it; Dharma, true religion, is the guide between the two.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕਚੇ ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ਤਿਨੑੀ ਨਿਹਚਉ ਦਰਗਹ ਹਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh kache koorriaar tinaee nihchau daragah haariaa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are worthless and false. Without a doubt, they lose in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੂਰ ਹੈ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਜਿਨੑੀ ਮਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee sabad soor hai kaam krodh jinaee maariaa |
lines.english: Those who follow the Guru's Teachings are the true spiritual warriors; they have conquered sexual desire and anger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਭਗਤ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਦੇ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਇ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: se bhagat tudh bhaavade sachai naae piaariaa |
lines.english: Those devotees are pleasing to Your Will, O Lord; they dearly love the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਮਹਲਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sachai andar mehal sabad savaariaa |
lines.english: They enter into the True Mansion of the Lord's Presence, embellished and exalted by the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਹਉ ਵਾਰਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: satigur sevan aapanaa tinaa vittahu hau vaariaa |5|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who serve their True Guru. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਂਨਵਿ ਊਂਨਵਿ ਆਇਆ ਵਰਸੈ ਲਾਇ ਝੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: aoonav aoonav aaeaa varasai laae jharree |
lines.english: Hanging low, low and thick in the sky, the clouds come, and water rains down in torrents.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਉਠਿ ਉਠਿ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਬਪੁੜੇਂ ਇਸੁ ਮੇਘੈ ਹਥਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa utth utth dekhahu bapurren is meghai hath kichh naeh |
lines.english: Why are you standing up, standing up to look? You poor wretch, this cloud has nothing in its hands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਾਣੈ ਚਲੈ ਕੰਤ ਕੈ ਸੁ ਮਾਣੇ ਸਦਾ ਰਲੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak bhaanai chalai kant kai su maane sadaa ralee |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, she walks in harmony with the Will of her Husband Lord; she enjoys peace and pleasure forever. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਏਹੁ ਮੇਘੁ ਪਠਾਇਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਮਨ ਮਾਂਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin ehu megh patthaaeaa tis raakhahu man maanhi |
lines.english: The One who sent this cloud - cherish Him in your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਸੀ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis no man vasaaeisee jaa kau nadar karee |
lines.english: He alone enshrines the Lord in his mind, upon whom the Lord bestows His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਬਾਹਰੀ ਸਭ ਕਰਣ ਪਲਾਹ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree baaharee sabh karan palaah karee |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, all those who lack this Grace, cry and weep and wail. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਡਾਣੇ ਆਕਾਸ ਕਰਿ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਢਾਹਿ ਉਸਾਰਣਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: aaddaane aakaas kar khin meh dtaeh usaaranahaar |
lines.english: He stretched the sky across the heavens; in an instant, He creates and destroys.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਸਰੇਵੀਐ ਜਿਸੁ ਕਰਤ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: so har sadaa sareveeai jis karat na laagai vaar |
lines.english: Serve the Lord forever; He acts in no time at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਕੈ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਵੀਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: aape jagat upaae kai kudarat kare veechaar |
lines.english: He Himself created the world; He contemplates His Creative Omnipotence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅਗੈ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਬਹੁਤੀ ਹੋਵੈ ਮਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh agai lekhaa mangeeai bahutee hovai maar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh will be called to account hereafter; he will be severely punished.
